title: Turing Public Model Catalog
description: Vendor-neutral, kind-aware catalog of LLM / embedding / rerank / media models (Block BC / T759). The source file keys entries by provider plugin type and omits the redundant per-entry 'vendor' (it is the map key); the published artifact (scripts/emit-model-catalog.mjs) adds 'vendor' to each entry for consumer convenience — hence 'vendor' is optional here.

version.description: Schema major version. Breaking changes bump this and the pinned catalog-vN.json URL.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 date the catalog was last regenerated.

vendors.description: Map of provider plugin type (lower-case) to its model entries.

id.description: The exact id sent to the vendor.

kind.description: Model kind (the TurLlmModelKind taxonomy, Block BB / T750).

vendor.description: Provider plugin type. Absent in the source (it is the map key); added to each entry in the published artifact.

embeddingDimensions.description: Output vector size — only meaningful for kind = EMBEDDING.

capabilities.description: Capability hints such as vision, tools, reasoning, multimodal.

openWeights.description: True when the model's weights are openly downloadable (open-weight), false when it is proprietary API-only. A universal, unambiguous fact that informs the type of use. Curated/anchored, omitted rather than guessed. Additive (Block I / T39).

parameters.description: Total parameter count, only when the vendor has publicly disclosed it (typical of open-weight models; absent for closed frontier models, so NOT a universal capability proxy). Curated/anchored, never guessed. Additive (Block I / T39).

deprecated.description: True when the vendor has retired or superseded the id.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens the model can emit in a single response, when known. Additive (Block BD / T764).

modalities.description: Supported input/output modalities, when known. Additive (Block BD / T764).

knowledgeCutoff.description: Training-data knowledge cutoff, ISO-8601 date or year-month (e.g. 2025-03 or 2025-03-01). Additive (Block BD / T764).

releaseDate.description: ISO-8601 date the model id became available. Additive (Block BD / T764).

aliases.description: Alternate ids that resolve to this model (e.g. dated snapshots, -latest pointers). Additive (Block BD / T764).

status.description: Lifecycle stage. GA = generally available; RETIRED = no longer served. Prefer this over the boolean `deprecated` when the exact stage is known. Additive (Block BD / T764).

sources.description: Provenance — the source ids (e.g. openai-api, litellm, overrides) that contributed fields to this entry, recorded by the regeneration pipeline (Block BD / T765). Additive (Block BD / T764).

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date this entry was last confirmed against its sources by the regeneration pipeline. Additive (Block BD / T764).

pricing.description: Optional INDICATIVE US list price — a reference only, NOT an authoritative or contract-accurate quote (verify with the vendor). Never per-contract/region/negotiated. Provenance-gated + never invented. Additive (Block F / T30).

benchmarks.description: Optional CITED third-party capability index (e.g. an Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index or LMArena Elo) — a reference to someone else's published number, NOT our quality verdict. Provenance-gated + never invented; verify at the source. Additive (Block I / T40).

performance.description: Optional CITED speed metrics (output throughput + time-to-first-token) — a second axis ('fast vs capable') alongside the capability index. A reference to a public measurement, NOT our own benchmark. Provenance-gated + never invented; verify at the source. Additive (Block I / T43).

pricing.description: Indicative US list price for a model id. Bounded by STRATEGY §I (reversed, Block F): US list price only, optional, provenance-gated, never invented, flagged non-authoritative. NOT a billing engine — no per-contract/region/negotiated/committed-use pricing.

inputPer1M.description: Indicative US list price in USD per 1,000,000 input (prompt) tokens.

outputPer1M.description: Indicative US list price in USD per 1,000,000 output (completion) tokens.

currency.description: Always USD — the catalog carries only an indicative US list price.

unit.description: Unit the per-* figures are expressed in (e.g. 'per_1M_tokens').

indicative.description: Always true — signals this is an indicative US list reference, NOT an authoritative or contract-accurate quote. Verify with the vendor.

note.description: Free-text disclaimer/qualifier travelling with the number (e.g. 'Indicative US list price — verify with vendor').

source.description: Provenance — where the price came from (e.g. litellm, overrides, a vendor pricing-page URL). Required: pricing is never invented.

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date this price was last confirmed against its source.

benchmarks.description: Cited third-party capability numbers for a model id (Block I / T40). Treated exactly like `pricing`: a REFERENCE to a public, citable leaderboard — never our own quality verdict, never invented. Provenance-gated (indicative + source + lastVerified). Verify at the source. The per-domain `scores` map is added by T42.

intelligenceIndex.description: A cited composite 'intelligence' index (e.g. the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index). A third-party number, not our verdict.

arenaElo.description: A cited human-preference Elo rating (e.g. LMArena). An alternative capability signal to intelligenceIndex.

scores.description: Optional per-domain cited scores (Block I / T42) — so capability is comparable per use-case, not one opaque number. Recommended keys: 'reasoning' (general reasoning), 'coding' (e.g. SWE-bench), 'math'. Each value is cited from the object's `source` unless it carries its own. A model uneven across domains is shown honestly.

value.description: The cited score for this domain (scale defined by the source).

source.description: Per-domain provenance override; falls back to the parent benchmarks.source when omitted.

lastVerified.description: Per-domain verification date; falls back to the parent benchmarks.lastVerified when omitted.

indicative.description: Always true — signals these are indicative, cited third-party numbers, NOT an authoritative or invented quality verdict. Verify at the source.

note.description: Free-text disclaimer/qualifier travelling with the numbers (e.g. 'Cited from Artificial Analysis — verify at the source').

source.description: Provenance — the citable leaderboard the numbers came from (e.g. 'Artificial Analysis', an LMArena URL). Required: benchmarks are never invented.

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date these numbers were last confirmed against their source.

performance.description: Cited speed metrics for a model id (Block I / T43). A second axis ('fast vs cheap vs capable') paired with `pricing` and `benchmarks`. Treated exactly like `pricing`: a REFERENCE to a public measurement (often the same leaderboard as `benchmarks`), never our own benchmark, never invented. Provenance-gated (indicative + source + lastVerified). Verify at the source.

throughputTps.description: Cited output throughput in tokens per second (higher = faster generation).

latencyTtftSec.description: Cited time-to-first-token in seconds (lower = more responsive).

indicative.description: Always true — signals these are indicative, cited third-party measurements, NOT authoritative or invented. Verify at the source.

note.description: Free-text disclaimer/qualifier travelling with the numbers (e.g. 'Cited from Artificial Analysis — verify at the source').

source.description: Provenance — the citable measurement source. Required: performance is never invented.

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date these numbers were last confirmed against their source.
